zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Browne於大約1423年出生在英國波克夏時，他的父親Robert Browne53歲，母親Lady Margaret Warren46歲。他於大約1434年與Lady Eleanor Arundel結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1460年被列為sheriff of kent 。他去世於1460年7月20日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年38歲，埋葬在英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Browne于大约1423年出生在英国波克夏时，他的父亲Robert Browne53岁，母亲Lady Margaret Warren46岁。他于大约1434年与Lady Eleanor Arundel结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1460年被列为sheriff of kent 。他去世于1460年7月20日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年38岁，埋葬在英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Browne was born about 1423, in Berkshire, England, his father, Robert Browne, was 53 and his mother, Lady Margaret Warren, was 46. He married Lady Eleanor Arundel about 1434. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. In 1460, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as sheriff of kent . He died on 20 July 1460, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Blackfriars, London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Browne est né environ 1423, à Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Browne, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Warren, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor Arundel environ 1434. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. En 1460, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of kent . Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1460, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Browne um 1423 in Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Browne 53 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Warren 46. Er hat um 1434 Lady Eleanor Arundel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1460, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of kent  aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Juli 1460 im Alter von 38 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Blackfriars, London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Browne è nato il circa 1423 nel Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Browne, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Warren, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Lady Eleanor Arundel circa 1434. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1460, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of kent . Morì il 20 luglio 1460, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Blackfriars, London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Browneが約1423年にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Browneは53歳，母Lady Margaret Warrenは46歳であった。約1434年にLady Eleanor Arundelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1460年，38歳の時，職業はsheriff of kent と記録されている。彼は1460年7月20日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで38歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Browne(이)가 대략 1423년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Browne(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Warren(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1434년 Lady Eleanor Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1460년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of kent 이었다. 그는 1460년 7월 20일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던 블랙프리아르스에 묻혔다.

mn.Betchworth Castle, Surrey, England: Betchworth, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Browne nasceu aproximadamente 1423, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Browne, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Warren, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor Arundel aproximadamente 1434. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1460, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of kent . Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1460, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Browne родился около 1423 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Browne было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Warren, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor Arundel около 1434 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1460 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of kent . Он умер 20 июля 1460 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Browne nació aproximadamente 1423, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Browne, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Warren, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Lady Eleanor Arundel aproximadamente 1434. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. En 1460, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of kent . Murió el 20 de julio de 1460, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra.
